folio.label: 197v
folio.l: O swete , and wel biloued , spouse deere
There is a counseil , & ©e wolde it heere
Whicú æ rigút fayn , I wolde vn to ©ow seye
So that ©e swere , ©e shuln it nat bywreye
¢ Valerian gan faste , vn to hire swere

note.notetxt: 148Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: That for no caas , ne thyng æ mygúte be
He shulde neuäe moo , bywreyen hire
And tha~ne at erst , to hi~ seide she
I haue an Aungel , whicú æ louetú me
That w gret loue , where so I wake or slepe
Is redy ay , my body for to kepe
¢ And if that he may felen , out of drede

note.notetxt: 155Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: That ©e me touche , or loue in vileynye
He rigút a non , wol sleen ©ow w the dede
And in ©oure ©outhe , thus ©e shulden dye
And if that ©e , in clene loue me gye
He wol ©ow loue as me , for ©oure clennesse
And shewe to ©ow his ioye , & his brigútnesse
¢ This valerian , corrected as god wolde

note.notetxt: 162Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Answerde a geyn , if I shal trosten the
Lat me that Aungel seen , & hi~ biholde
And if that it , a verray Aungel be
Than wol I doon , as æè hast preyed me
And if æè loue , a nother man forsothe
Rigút w this swerd , than wol I slee ©ow bothe
¢ Cecile answerde a noon , rigút in this wyse

note.notetxt: 169Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: If that ©ow list , the Aungel shuln ©e se
So that ©e trowe on Crist , & ©ow baptize
Gotú fortú , to via apia , quod she
That fro this toun , ne stant but myles three
And to the pouere folkes , æ there dwellen

note.notetxt: 174 Folkes seem a correction from fowes. Double check MS.ODR

folio.l: Sey he~ rigút , as that I shal ©ow tellen
¢ Telle he~ that I Cecile , ©ow to hem sente

note.notetxt: 176Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: To shewen ©ow , the goode vrban the olde
For secree nedes , and for good entente
And whan æ ©e , Seynt Vrban han biholde
Telle hi~ tho wordes , whicú I to ©ow tolde
And whan that he , hatú purged ©ow fro synne
Than shuln ©e sen æ Aungel , er we twynne
¢ This Valerian , is to the place goon

note.notetxt: 183Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: And rigút as he was taugút , by his lernynge
He fond this holy vrban , a noon
A mong the Seyntes buriels , lotynge

note.notetxt: .i. latitante186 This word is added above lotynge. This is an interlinear glossand does not need to be tagged. ODR.Est

folio.l: And he a noon , w outen tariynge
